description: InterventionPoint policy_target paths must use the $snap root; other roots fail validation.
manifest_yaml:
agent_control_specification_version: 0.3.1-beta
policies:
  test_policy:
    type: test
intervention_points:
  input:
    policy_target_kind: user_input
    policy:
      id: test_policy
    policy_target: $pi.input
